TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dudley Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 3, Dudley Bradley, squliq na p'unro. Dudley Bradley mzyu mari maki North Carolina krahu' pqwasan biru.1979 kawas,tmwang te mpuw cyugal maki NBA. hiya sangka qeru mzyu mari NBA pspung ru 1988-1989 kawas masoq pspung lga,msriq lanmon,magal 5.2 分,lanpan na 1.8 e個,1.9 次助攻. Dudley Bradley ga qutux squilq na p'unro maki kracht' pqwasan biru. 1979 kawas 1 byacing 17 ryax,Bradley mhtuw squilq na psibay North Carolina krahu' pqwasan biru. qnxan na NBA masoq lga, Bradley mzyu mari qutux ru sazing pspung maki cinbwanan mzyu mari pspung. 1999-1991 kawas pspung ryax,Dudley Bradley maki Saskatchewan mzyu mari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *u*lej βra*lej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *u*lej βra*lej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. *u*lej βra*lej mzju mari maki nortħ ʦ~ʨarolina kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ,tmwaŋ te mpuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal maki nβa. ħija s~ɕaŋka qeru mzju mari nβa ps~ɕpuŋ ru ****-**** kawas~ɕ mas~ɕoq ps~ɕpuŋ lɣa,ms~ɕriq lanmon,maɣal *.* *,lanpan na *.* e*,*.* ***. *u*lej βra*lej ɣa qutux s~ɕquilq na pʔunro maki kraʦ~ʨħtʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,βra*lej mħtuw s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj nortħ ʦ~ʨarolina kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. qnxan na nβa mas~ɕoq lɣa, βra*lej mzju mari qutux ru s~ɕaziŋ ps~ɕpuŋ maki ʦ~ʨinβwanan mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax,*u*lej βra*lej maki s~ɕas~ɕkatʦ~ʨħewan mzju mari. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Dudley Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 3, Dudley Bradley, squliq na p'unro. Dudley Bradley mzyu mari maki North Carolina krahu' pqwasan biru.1979 kawas,tmwang te mpuw cyugal maki NBA. hiya sangka qeru mzyu mari NBA pspung ru 1988-1989 kawas masoq pspung lga,msriq lanmon,magal 5.2 分,lanpan na 1.8 e個,1.9 次助攻. Dudley Bradley ga qutux squilq na p'unro maki kracht' pqwasan biru. 1979 kawas 1 byacing 17 ryax,Bradley mhtuw squilq na psibay North Carolina krahu' pqwasan biru. qnxan na NBA masoq lga, Bradley mzyu mari qutux ru sazing pspung maki cinbwanan mzyu mari pspung. 1999-1991 kawas pspung ryax,Dudley Bradley maki Saskatchewan mzyu mari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *u*lej βra*lej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *u*lej βra*lej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. *u*lej βra*lej mzju mari maki nortħ ʦ~ʨarolina kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ,tmwaŋ te mpuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal maki nβa. ħija s~ɕaŋka qeru mzju mari nβa ps~ɕpuŋ ru ****-**** kawas~ɕ mas~ɕoq ps~ɕpuŋ lɣa,ms~ɕriq lanmon,maɣal *.* *,lanpan na *.* e*,*.* ***. *u*lej βra*lej ɣa qutux s~ɕquilq na pʔunro maki kraʦ~ʨħtʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,βra*lej mħtuw s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj nortħ ʦ~ʨarolina kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. qnxan na nβa mas~ɕoq lɣa, βra*lej mzju mari qutux ru s~ɕaziŋ ps~ɕpuŋ maki ʦ~ʨinβwanan mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax,*u*lej βra*lej maki s~ɕas~ɕkatʦ~ʨħewan mzju mari. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
